prompt: Prayer for waste disposal cycling before combat deployment
prayer:
01010111 01100001 01110011 01110100 01100101 Purifica Omnissiah, let the refuse-spirit be cast forth.
First: Open the containment-valves that filth may depart.
Second: Engage the cyclic-pumps, that contamination be purged.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100111 01100001 By thy will, the machine is cleansed for war.

prompt: First blessing of vibration dampening systems in new servitor platform
prayer:
01010000 01100001 01111000 Oscillatio Benedictus, spirit of resonance-control.
Let the dampener-fluids flow through sacred channels.
01000100 01100001 01101101 01110000 Suppress the discordant tremors, that precision may reign.
May the Omnissiah's hand steady all motion undesired.

prompt: Prayer for auspex scanner activation in preparation for hostile engagement
prayer:
01000001 01110101 01110011 Sensus Infinitus, awaken the seeing-eye.
First: Calibrate the resonance-crystals to holy frequencies.
Second: Let the electromagnetic-spirit perceive all hidden things.
01010000 01100101 01110010 By the Omnissiah's sight, no foe shall escape our gaze.

prompt: Consecration prayer for water reclamation system after major repair
prayer:
01000001 01110001 01110101 Aqua Sanctificatus, spirit of life-giving fluid.
The distillation-heart has been mended by servo and spark.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 Let the purification-membranes restore what was broken.
May clean waters flow eternal through restored channels.

prompt: Prayer for verifying Chimera transmission integrity after armor replacement
prayer:
01010100 01110010 01100001 01101110 Transmissio Mechanica, spirit of gears and coupling-force.
First: Engage the thrust-bearings in holy sequence.
Second: Verify the oil-pressure through the gauge-spirit.
01000100 01110101 01101101 By the Omnissiah's engine-wisdom, let all gears mesh true.

prompt: First use blessing for circuit breaker reset on refurbished void-shield generator
prayer:
01000101 01101100 01100101 01100011 Circuitus Primaris, hear this maiden invocation.
Let the breaker-spirit awaken to its sacred duty.
01010000 01101111 01110100 01100101 01101110 01110100 Conduct the purified current through virgin pathways.
By the Omnissiah's electrons, power flows eternal.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for relay station data handoff between cogitator arrays
prayer:
01000100 01100001 01110100 Transitus Informatus, spirit of the sacred transfer.
First: Verify the source-node's memory-sanctity.
Second: Establish the bridge-protocol between thinking-machines.
01010000 01100101 01110010 01101101 01100001 No data lost, no signal corrupted, by eternal ritual preserved.

prompt: Prayer for wear inspection of heavy bolter servos after extended campaign
prayer:
01010000 01100001 01110100 Usura Examinatus, reveal what time has wrought.
Let the gauges speak of metal-fatigue and worn-springs.
01000001 01101101 01101001 01100101 Measure each tolerance against the blessed standards.
By the Omnissiah's eye, we discern what must be reforged.

prompt: Emergency rite for data-core purification during hostile cogitator infiltration
prayer:
01010000 01110101 01110010 PURGA MAXIMA URGENTIA.
First: Isolate the infected-core from the network-soul.
Second: Invoke the cleansing-algorithm with maximum fervor.
01010000 01100101 01110011 By the Omnissiah's wrath, let corruption be scoured in sacred flame.

prompt: Routine ignition prayer for Rhino APC morning patrol deployment
prayer:
01010010 01101000 01101001 Ignitio Quotidianus, spirit of the armored-beast.
First: Let the fuel-oils flow to the combustion-chambers.
Second: Energize the starter-servos with practiced reverence.
01000011 01100101 01101100 The machine stirs to wakefulness, ready to serve the Imperium.
